query: SELECT fs.plotArea, fs.gfaResidential, fs.gfaRetail, fs.gfaOffices, fs.estimatedBua, fs.landPrice, fs.constructionCostPerSqft, fs.residentialSalePrice, fs.retailSalePrice, fs.officesSalePrice, fs.community, fs.saleableResidentialPct, fs.saleableRetailPct FROM feasibility_studies fs WHERE fs.projectId = 3 LIMIT 1;
